CustomField.formula: IF( OR( Disty_with_Signed_POC_Addendum__r.Name = 'Commtech', Disty_with_Signed_POC_Addendum__r.Name = 'VCP', Disty_with_Signed_POC_Addendum__r.Name = 'Promark', Disty_with_Signed_POC_Addendum__r.Name = 'Alturna Tech', Disty_with_Signed_POC_Addendum__r.Name = 'Anexinet', Disty_with_Signed_POC_Addendum__r.Name = 'Application 2U, LLC', Disty_with_Signed_POC_Addendum__r.Name = 'Arrosoft Solutions LLC', Disty_with_Signed_POC_Addendum__r.Name = 'Virtual Enterprises', Disty_with_Signed_POC_Addendum__r.Name = 'Redicloud', Disty_with_Signed_POC_Addendum__r.Name = 'Bay Pointe Technology', Disty_with_Signed_POC_Addendum__r.Name = 'BEArena' ), TRUE, FALSE )
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Contingent Upon a Distributor having a signed POC Addendum
CustomField.label: POC Agreement Waived
